'''''Rehz'nor''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The frigate played a supporting role during the [[Battle of Gaerboud IV]], during which the Alliance attempted to interdict a shipment of [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] being ferried from the [[Sentinel (Deep Space Manufacturing Facility)|''Sentinel'']] manufacturing facility to the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial I-class Star Destroyer]] [[Dauntless (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Dauntless'']]. The mission called for a number of Rebel starfighters to intercept and destroy the TIE Avengers. In the event that the Avengers, being flown by inexperienced workers rather than combat pilots, reached the ''Dauntless'', the ''Rehz'nor'' was tasked with delivering additional [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] to the theatre. These additional forces were to carry out [[Torpedo/Legends|torpedo]] runs against the ''Dauntless'' in an attempt to destroy it.

The ''Rehz'nor'' was also the local command ship of [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadron]] for at least a short time, including during the interrupted resupply [[Ambush of Rebel Alliance Frigate Rehz'nor]], possibly following (or preceding) the [[Battle of Gaerboud IV]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
